meaning: 1. to shut out; 2. to block; 3. to smother
sentence: 该账号因违规被平台封杀。
pinyin: Gāi zhànghào yīn wéiguī bèi píngtái fēngshā.
english: The account was banned by the platform for violating the rules.

sentence: 雅典是古希腊最著名的城邦之一。
pinyin: Yǎdiǎn shì gǔ Xīlà zuì zhùmíng de chéngbāng zhī yī.
english: Athens is one of the most famous city-states of ancient Greece.

sentence: 今天的天气极好，适合出游。
pinyin: Jīntiān de tiānqì jí hǎo, shìhé chūyóu.
english: The weather today is excellent, perfect for an outing.

meaning: 1. span; 2. horizontal distance between vertical supports
sentence: 这座桥的跨度超过一百米。
pinyin: Zhè zuò qiáo de kuādù chāoguò yī bǎi mǐ.
english: The span of this bridge exceeds one hundred meters.

meaning: 1. to loiter (i.e. reluctant to leave); 2. to linger on
sentence: 她在花园里流连，不肯离去。
pinyin: Tā zài huāyuán lǐ liúlián, bù kěn lí qù.
english: She lingered in the garden, reluctant to leave.
